corridors.name: Strait of Hormuz
corridors.description: Narrow chokepoint between the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman; the single largest artery for India's crude imports from Gulf producers.

corridors.name: Red Sea
corridors.description: Bab-el-Mandeb to the Suez Canal corridor carrying West African, Mediterranean, US, and some Russian barrels toward India; exposed to Houthi shipping attacks.

corridors.name: Cape of Good Hope
corridors.description: Longer diversion route around southern Africa used when the Red Sea or Suez is disrupted; adds voyage days but avoids chokepoints.
